ddls:
CREATE TABLE "academic_years" (
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each academic year */,
  "year_name" TEXT /* Name of the academic year */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the academic year */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the academic year */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "programs" (
  "program_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each program */,
  "program_name" TEXT /* Name of the academic program */,
  "degree" TEXT /* Degree offered for the program */,
  "language" TEXT /* Language preference for the program */,
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the academic year */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the department offering the program */,
  "program_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the program */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the program is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("program_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_programs_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("year_id") REFERENCES academic_years ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "faculties" (
  "faculty_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each faculty */,
  "faculty_name" TEXT /* Name of the faculty */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the department the faculty belongs to */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the faculty */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the faculty */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("faculty_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "program_faculty" (
  "program_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the program */,
  "faculty_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the faculty */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the faculty in the program */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("program_id", "faculty_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "degrees" (
  "degree_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each degree */,
  "degree_name" TEXT /* Name of the degree */,
  "duration_years" INTEGER /* Duration of the degree in years */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("degree_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "languages" (
  "language_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each language */,
  "language_name" TEXT /* Name of the language */,
  "is_primary" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the language is the primary language of the program */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("language_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "program_language" (
  "program_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the program */,
  "language_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the language */,
  "is_primary" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the language is the primary language of the program */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("program_id", "language_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "students" (
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student */,
  "student_name" TEXT /* Name of the student */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the student */,
  "program_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the program the student is enrolled in */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the student */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the student */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the student */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_students_program_id FOREIGN KEY ("program_id") REFERENCES programs ("program_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "faculty_assignments" (
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each faculty assignment */,
  "faculty_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the faculty */,
  "program_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the program */,
  "assignment_year" INTEGER /* Reference to the academic year */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the faculty in the program */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_faculty_assignments_faculty_id FOREIGN KEY ("faculty_id") REFERENCES faculties ("faculty_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_faculty_assignments_assignment_year FOREIGN KEY ("assignment_year") REFERENCES academic_years ("year_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_faculty_assignments_program_id FOREIGN KEY ("program_id") REFERENCES programs ("program_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "program_changes" (
  "change_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each program change */,
  "program_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the program */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Description of the change */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date when the change was made */,
  "changed_by" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who made the change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("change_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_program_changes_program_id FOREIGN KEY ("program_id") REFERENCES programs ("program_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "program_enrollment" (
  "enrollment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each enrollment */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the student */,
  "program_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the program */,
  "enrollment_year" INTEGER /* Reference to the academic year */,
  "enrollment_status" TEXT /* Status of the enrollment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("enrollment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_program_enrollment_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_program_enrollment_program_id FOREIGN KEY ("program_id") REFERENCES programs ("program_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_program_enrollment_enrollment_year FOREIGN KEY ("enrollment_year") REFERENCES academic_years ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "program_resources" (
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each resource */,
  "program_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the program */,
  "resource_description" TEXT /* Description of the resource */,
  "allocation_date" TEXT /* Date when the resource was allocated */,
  "resource_type" TEXT /* Type of the resource */,
  "allocated_by" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who allocated the resource */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("resource_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_program_resources_program_id FOREIGN KEY ("program_id") REFERENCES programs ("program_id")
)
